# Specification sheets

<!-- source: 09-specification-sheets.qmd (project organisation, README/AGENTS.md template,
     and the full worked example spec sheet for the fish/coral case study — largest
     single reuse target in the book) -->

Bringing steps 1-3 together into a single, detailed specification sheet, with a full worked example for the topa/coral-cover case study.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge writing your own spec sheet section for a variation on the topa analysis.
:::
